prompt: For the '2026 FIFA World Cup Winner' event, pull the live-volume breakdown across all submarkets and rank the top 10 country contracts by share of event total volume right now — I want to see where today's trading concentration is happening inside this multi-month tournament market.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
As of May 5, 2026, at 08:35 UTC, the primary **2026 FIFA World Cup Winner** tournament market has recorded a total trading volume of **$890,388,134.65**. Trading concentration is currently distributed across 48 outcome contracts, with a notable concentration in several long-shot countries alongside traditional favorites.

The following table ranks the top 10 country contracts by their share of the total event volume:

| 4 | New Zealand | 27,307,514.66 | 3.07% | 0.0025 |
| 5 | Saudi Arabia | 25,172,153.29 | 2.83% | 0.0025 |
| 6 | South Africa | 25,144,883.02 | 2.82% | 0.0025 |
| 7 | Jordan | 23,863,751.25 | 2.68% | 0.0025 |
| 8 | France | 23,446,428.11 | 2.63% | 0.1665 |
| 9 | Qatar | 22,429,353.84 | 2.52% | 0.0025 |
| 10 | Iran | 22,393,517.12 | 2.52% | 0.0015 |

### Analysis and Gaps
